name: KrillApp.Trigger.HighThreshold
title: High Threshold
description: Triggers an alarm and executes child nodes when the parent DataPoint's value reaches or exceeds a configured threshold. Compares the DataPoint snapshot value against the threshold: fires when value >= threshold. Sets node state to WARN on breach.
shortDescription: Triggers when a DataPoint value reaches or exceeds a configured upper limit.
llmPurpose: Evaluates whether a DataPoint value is at or above a threshold and triggers child execution and alarm state when breached.
llmBehavior: sets node state to WARN on breach
llmOutputs: executes child nodes when threshold is breached
llmCreationHints: Create a HighThreshold when the user wants to be alerted or trigger actions when a value exceeds a maximum. Requires a numeric threshold value.

llmConnectionHints.role: conditional trigger that fires when DataPoint value is at or above threshold

llmExamples: Alert me when the temperature exceeds 100 degrees.
Trigger a webhook when pressure goes above 50 PSI.
Warn me when CPU usage reaches 90%.
